name: Intruder Alarm - Yellow Alert
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>敵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>襲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>警</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>報</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－イエローアラート－
desc: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Special Summon 1 monster from your hand, but return it to the hand at the end of the Battle Phase. While you control that face-up Special Summoned monster, your opponent cannot target other monsters for attacks. You can only activate 1 "Intruder Alarm - Yellow Alert" per turn.
eff: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Special Summon 1 monster from your hand, but return it to the hand at the end of the Battle Phase. While you control that face-up Special Summoned monster, your opponent cannot target other monsters for attacks. You can only activate 1 "Intruder Alarm - Yellow Alert" per turn.

action: Returns from your field to your hand
attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
